# brightcap — Cambridge Property Co-Investment

> brightcap acquires residential blocks in Cambridge in selective partnership with sophisticated co-investors.

## About brightcap

brightcap is a property co-investment platform focused exclusively on Cambridge, UK. We acquire residential blocks in one of the world's most resilient property markets — a city built to thrive in the AI era.

We partner with business owners to grow their wealth through acquiring residential property in cities at the centre of the AI transformation.

## The Opportunity — Our Thesis

AI is accelerating the economic growth of a small number of cities — and leaving others behind. That's not a cycle — it's a shift.

The cities at the centre of it will attract talent, capital and opportunity for decades — driving long-term rental demand and property values in the process.

The market hasn't priced this in yet. We've built our strategy around it.

## Why Cambridge

Cambridge is our first market — the world's leading science and tech cluster.

Key stats:
- No.1 Global Science & Tech cluster in the world — three years running (WIPO 2022–2024)
- No.1 UK university for world-class talent
- 5,300+ science & tech firms including Google, Apple, ARM, AstraZeneca
- 50% capital growth over the last 10 years
- 5× the UK's average employment growth

With world-class research, a deep talent pipeline, and structural supply constraints, Cambridge offers a rare combination of long-term demand drivers and limited housing supply.

## What We Acquire

We buy residential blocks in Cambridge and turn them into high quality homes — with our partner investors.

Our three-step process:
1. Acquire undervalued blocks — typically 2 to 20 units
2. Create 15–25% equity uplift — through title splitting and high-spec renovation of each unit
3. Generate long-term hands-off income — let to professional tenants or supported living providers

## Our Construction Team

Our renovations are delivered by our founder's family-run construction and maintenance business — building in Cambridge for over 25 years. They build to last and the same team maintains it — so standards stay high and issues get resolved fast.

Project examples include kitchen renovations, church conversions, living room refurbishments, and extensions.

## Who Invests With Us

Our partner investors are exited founders and business owners with capital to put to work, who want long-term exposure to Cambridge without building their own property team.

- Exited founders — who've sold or taken significant cash out of a business
- Business owners — generating strong profits and looking to grow outside their core industry

Typical investment amounts range from £250k to £3m+.

## The Founders

brightcap is led by entrepreneurs with a track record of building businesses and delivering property projects for private investors.

- **Andy Fidler** — Decades of experience building and scaling businesses. £5.7M property portfolio. Featured in BBC, The Telegraph, and multiple property industry publications. Winner of 20+ UK & Global property and business awards.
- **Sam Carter** — Co-founder with combined 34 years of experience across property and business.

Alongside brightcap, they own MarketOffer, a nationwide social housing leasing platform, and Sam's family construction and maintenance business has been delivering projects in Cambridge for over 25 years.

brightcap is built on a simple conviction: the right location, the right thesis, and the right local partnerships matter more than financial engineering.

## Investor Testimonial

"I was looking to grow my wealth through property investment but didn't have the expertise or time to handle it myself. Sam and his team made the entire process seamless, managing everything from start to finish. Their professionalism and expertise have exceeded my expectations – an effortless investment experience with a great return!" — Mr. Tomlinson, Business Owner

## Featured In

BBC, The Telegraph, Landlord Today, Landlord Zone, NRLA, Property Notify, Property Entrepreneur, Property Investor Awards.

## Contact

Interested in growing your property wealth in the AI era? If you're looking to grow your wealth through property in one of the world's few cities built to thrive in the AI era — without building your own property team — we'd love to talk.

Book a partner investor call — a 30-minute call to understand your goals, walk you through our Cambridge block strategy, and explore whether there's a genuine fit.

Website: https://cambridge-capital-flow.lovable.app
